name: GKE node pool uses default service account with full API access
description: GKE cluster node pool(s) are using the Compute Engine default service account with the cloud-platform (full API access) OAuth scope. This grants all workloads running on the nodes unrestricted access to all GCP APIs, enabling privilege escalation from a compromised pod.
remediation: Create a dedicated least-privilege service account for GKE nodes. Grant only the minimum required IAM roles. Use Workload Identity to give individual pods fine-grained service account access rather than relying on node-level OAuth scopes.
